about.title: About
about.heading: Designing the future of autonomous engineering.
body: With a focus on agentic programming, I build systems that do more than react to inputs: they reason and operate autonomously to solve complex engineering problems.

My background combines the robustness of systems architecture with the agility of modern interfaces. I strongly believe premium software is born at the intersection of technical performance and impeccable editorial aesthetics.

contact.title: Collaboration
contact.heading: Ready to scale your infrastructure?
contact.description: Currently available for technical consulting projects and the development of systems built on agentic AI.
